info.title: Azure File Storage
info.description: Azure File Storage provides scalable file shares in the cloud using SMB and NFS protocols.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the service account, share, directory or file that is the target of the desired operation.

put.description: Creates a new file or replaces a file. Note it only initializes the file with no content.

parameters.name: x-ms-version
parameters.description: Specifies the version of the operation to use for this request.

parameters.name: x-ms-client-request-id
parameters.description: An opaque, globally-unique, client-generated string identifier for the request.

parameters.name: x-ms-content-length
parameters.description: Specifies the number of bytes being transmitted in the request body. When the x-ms-write header is set to clear, the value of this header must be set to zero.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: The timeout parameter is expressed in seconds.

parameters.name: x-ms-type
parameters.description: Dummy type header, must be "file".

parameters.name: x-ms-content-type
parameters.description: Sets the MIME content type of the file. The default type is 'application/octet-stream'.

parameters.name: x-ms-content-encoding
parameters.description: Specifies which content encodings have been applied to the file.

parameters.name: x-ms-content-language
parameters.description: Specifies the natural languages used by this resource.

parameters.name: x-ms-cache-control
parameters.description: Sets the file's cache control. The File service stores this value but does not use or modify it.

parameters.name: x-ms-content-md5
parameters.description: An MD5 hash of the file content. This hash is used to verify the integrity of the file during transport.

parameters.name: x-ms-content-disposition
parameters.description: Sets the file's Content-Disposition header.

parameters.name: x-ms-meta
parameters.description: Optional. User-defined metadata for the resource.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-permission
parameters.description: If specified the permission (security descriptor) shall be set for the directory/file. This header can be used if Permission size is <= 8KB, else x-ms-file-permission-key header shall be used. Default value: Inherit. If SDDL is specified as input, it must have owner, group and dacl. Note: Only one of the x-ms-file-permission or x-ms-file-permission-key should be specified.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-permission-key
parameters.description: Key of the permission to be set for the directory/file. Note: Only one of the x-ms-file-permission or x-ms-file-permission-key should be specified.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-attributes
parameters.description: If specified, the provided file attributes shall be set. Default value: 'Archive' for file and 'Directory' for directory. 'None' can also be specified as default.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-creation-time
parameters.description: Creation time for the file/directory. Default value: Now.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-last-write-time
parameters.description: Last write time for the file/directory. Default value: Now.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-change-time
parameters.description: Change time for the file/directory. Default value: Now.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-permission-format
parameters.description: Optional. Used to set permission format.

parameters.name: x-ms-lease-id
parameters.description: If specified, the lease ID must match the lease ID of the file.

parameters.name: x-ms-allow-trailing-dot
parameters.description: If true, the trailing dot will not be trimmed from the target file/directory path.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-request-intent
parameters.description: Valid values are 'backup'.

parameters.name: x-ms-owner
parameters.description: Optional, NFS only. The owner of the file or directory.

parameters.name: x-ms-group
parameters.description: Optional, NFS only. The owning group of the file or directory.

parameters.name: x-ms-mode
parameters.description: Optional, NFS only. The file mode of the file or directory.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-file-type
parameters.description: Optional, NFS only. Type of the file or directory.

parameters.name: Content-MD5
parameters.description: An MD5 hash of the content. This hash is used to verify the integrity of the data during transport.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-property-semantics
parameters.description: SMB only. Default value is New.

parameters.name: Content-Length
parameters.description: Optional. Specifies the content length of the file.

parameters.name: x-ms-structured-body
parameters.description: Specifies the response content should be returned as a structured message and specifies the message schema version and properties.

parameters.name: x-ms-structured-content-length
parameters.description: Required if the request body is a structured message. Specifies the length of the blob/file content inside the message body. Will always be smaller than Content-Length.

parameters.description: Initial data.

parameters.description: Specifies the maximum size of the share, in gigabytes.

parameters.description: Specifies the access tier of the share.

parameters.name: x-ms-enabled-protocols
parameters.description: Protocols to enable on the share.

parameters.name: x-ms-root-squash
parameters.description: Root squash to set on the share. Only valid for NFS shares.

parameters.name: x-ms-enable-snapshot-virtual-directory-access
parameters.description: Optional. Used to enable snapshot virtual directory access.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-paid-bursting-enabled
parameters.description: Optional. Boolean. Default if not specified is false. This property enables paid bursting.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-paid-bursting-max-iops
parameters.description: Optional. Integer. Default if not specified is the maximum IOPS the file share can support. Current maximum for a file share is 102,400 IOPS.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-paid-bursting-max-bandwidth-mibps
parameters.description: Optional. Integer. Default if not specified is the maximum throughput the file share can support. Current maximum for a file share is 10,340 MiB/sec.

parameters.name: x-ms-file-request-intent
parameters.description: Valid values are 'backup'.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-provisioned-iops
parameters.description: Optional. Specifies the provisioned IOPS of the share.

parameters.name: x-ms-share-provisioned-bandwidth-mibps
parameters.description: Optional. Specifies the provisioned bandwidth of the share, in MiBps.

parameters.name: x-ms-enable-smb-directory-lease
parameters.description: Optional. Used to enable SMB directory lease.

Azure.Core.eTag.description:
The ETag (or entity tag) HTTP response header is an identifier for a specific version of a resource.
It lets caches be more efficient and save bandwidth, as a web server does not need to resend a full response if the content was not changed.

It is a string of ASCII characters placed between double quotes, like "675af34563dc-tr34".

CorsRule.description:
CORS is an HTTP feature that enables a web application running under one domain
to access resources in another domain. Web browsers implement a security
restriction known as same-origin policy that prevents a web page from calling
APIs in a different domain; CORS provides a secure way to allow one domain (the
origin domain) to call APIs in another domain.

allowedOrigins.description:
The origin domains that are permitted to make a request against the storage
service via CORS. The origin domain is the domain from which the request
originates. Note that the origin must be an exact case-sensitive match with the
origin that the user age sends to the service. You can also use the wildcard
character '*' to allow all origin domains to make requests via CORS.

allowedMethods.description:
The methods (HTTP request verbs) that the origin domain may use for a CORS
request. (comma separated)

allowedHeaders.description: The request headers that the origin domain may specify on the CORS request.

exposedHeaders.description:
The response headers that may be sent in the response to the CORS request and
exposed by the browser to the request issuer.

maxAgeInSeconds.description:
The maximum amount time that a browser should cache the preflight OPTIONS
request.

Error.description:
The error response.

This defines the wire format only. Language SDKs wrap this in idiomatic error types.

contentLength.description:
Content length of the file. This value may not be up-to-date since an SMB
client may have modified the file locally. The value of Content-Length may not
reflect that fact until the handle is closed or the op-lock is broken. To
retrieve current property values, call Get File Properties.

FileRangeWriteFromUrlType.description: Only update is supported: - Update: Writes the bytes downloaded from the source url into the specified range.

values.name: update
values.description: Writes the bytes specified by the source URL into the specified range.

FileRangeWriteType.description: Specify one of the following options: - Update: Writes the bytes specified by the request body into the specified range. - Clear: Clears the specified range and releases the space used in storage for that range.

values.name: update
values.description: Writes the bytes specified by the request body into the specified range.

values.name: clear
values.description: Clears the specified range and releases the space used in storage for that range.

version.description: The version of Storage Analytics to configure.

enabled.description: Indicates whether metrics are enabled for the File service.

includeApis.description:
Indicates whether metrics should generate summary statistics for called API
operations.

enabled.description:
Indicates whether a retention policy is enabled for the File service. If false,
metrics data is retained, and the user is responsible for deleting it.

days.description:
Indicates the number of days that metrics data should be retained. All data
older than this value will be deleted. Metrics data is deleted on a best-effort
basis after the retention period expires.

ShareAccessTier.description: The access tier of the share.

ShareItemInternal.description: A listed Azure Storage share item.

encryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

ShareNfsSettingsEncryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

required.description: If encryption in transit is required

SharePermission.description: A permission (a security descriptor) at the share level.

permission.description: The permission in the Security Descriptor Definition Language (SDDL).

nextAllowedQuotaDowngradeTime.description: The next allowed quota downgrade time.

leaseStatus.description: The current lease status of the share.

leaseDuration.description:
When a share is leased, specifies whether the lease is of infinite or fixed
duration.

enableSnapshotVirtualDirectoryAccess.description: Whether snapshot virtual directory access is enabled.

paidBurstingMaxIops.description: The maximum IOPS for paid bursting.

paidBurstingMaxBandwidthMibps.description: The maximum bandwidth for paid bursting in MiBps.

maxBurstCreditsForIops.description: The maximum burst credits for IOPS.

nextAllowedProvisionedIopsDowngradeTime.description: The next allowed provisioned IOPS downgrade time.

nextAllowedProvisionedBandwidthDowngrade.description: The next allowed provisioned bandwidth downgrade time.

enableSmbDirectoryLease.description: Whether SMB directory lease is enabled.

ShareRootSquash.description: The root squash setting for the share.

encryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

ShareSmbSettingsEncryptionInTransit.description: Enable or disable encryption in transit.

required.description: If encryption in transit is required

shareUsageBytes.description:
The approximate size of the data stored in bytes. Note that this value may not
include all recently created or recently resized files.

SignedIdentifiers.description: Represents an array of signed identifiers

StorageErrorCode.description: Error codes returned by the service

hourMetrics.description: A summary of request statistics grouped by API in hourly aggregates for files.

minuteMetrics.description: A summary of request statistics grouped by API in minute aggregates for files.

signedOid.description: The Azure Active Directory object ID in GUID format.

signedTid.description: The Azure Active Directory tenant ID in GUID format

signedStart.description: The date-time the key is active

signedService.description: Abbreviation of the Azure Storage service that accepts the key

signedVersion.description: The service version that created the key

signedDelegatedUserTid.description:
The delegated user tenant id in Azure AD. Return if DelegatedUserTid is
specified.

value.description: The key as a base64 string
